snippet.title: All the Prime MinisterвАЩs Men  | Al Jazeera Investigations
snippet.description:
An explosive investigation reveals how a criminal gang is colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh and has links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina.

Undercover reporters with the I-Unit expose how a former street mafia claims to have captured a state. The brother of BangladeshвАЩs army chief boasts that he can use police and paramilitary units to abduct rivals and earn millions in bribes.

Documents obtained by the I-Unit also show that head of the army has helped a convicted killer evade justice. And how the countryвАЩs military intelligence service has secretly bought spyware from Israel вАУ a country that Bangladesh does not recognise вАУ that can monitor the prime ministerвАЩs political rivals. 

The I-Unit invited all those involved in this investigation to respond to our findings. They included BangladeshвАЩs Prime Minister, Home Minister, Inspector General, Police Commissioner and all four Ahmed Brothers. 

None responded to our inquiries.

After the release of the investigation, BangladeshвАЩs Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a statement describing our findings as a вАЬsmear campaignвАЭ that was orchestrated by opponents of the regime based abroad.
It dismissed statements made by the brother of BangladeshвАЩs Chief of Army Staff s baseless and said Haris Ahmed had no links to Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina or any other state institution.

snippet.description:
Al JazeeraвАЩs Investigative Unit has uncovered a criminal network colluding with the security forces of Bangladesh which is profiting from powerful links with the countryвАЩs prime minister.
Our investigation found evidence that General Aziz Ahmed, head of the Bangladesh Army, helped criminals to evade justice and make money from state corruption. 
Al Jazeera's Will Thorne has this exclusive report.

snippet.title: Saiyaan Ji вЦЇ Yo Yo Honey Singh, Neha Kakkar|Nushrratt Bharuccha|  Lil G, Hommie D| Mihir G|Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Saiyaan Ji"; a brand new song in the voice of вАЬYo Yo Honey SinghвАЭ & "Neha Kakkar" featuring Yo Yo Honey Singh & Nushrratt Bharuccha. The lyrics of the new song are penned by Yo Yo Honey Singh, Lil Golu, Hommie Dilliwala & music produced by Yo Yo Honey Singh. The video is directed by Mihir Gulati.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвАЩt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвАЩs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вАФ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвАЩs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвАЩt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вАФ The pacifier hack 

2:42 вАФ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вАФ The getting along/best friendsвАЩ shirt 

7:20 вАФ Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вАФ Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: а¶Еа¶¶аІНа¶≠аІБа¶§ а¶¶аІНа¶ђаІАа¶™аІЗ а¶§аІМа¶єа¶ња¶¶ а¶Жа¶ЂаІНа¶∞а¶ња¶¶а¶њ | Munshiganj | Mawa Ghat | Tawhid Afridi | Vlog 79
snippet.description:
TAWHID AFRIDI - BIKRAMPUR - MUNSHIGANJ - MAWA GHAT - PADMA BRIDGE - а¶§аІМа¶єа¶ња¶¶ а¶Жа¶ЂаІНа¶∞а¶ња¶¶а¶њ - а¶¶аІНа¶ђаІАа¶™

In this vlog we showed the beauty of Munshiganj like Mawa Ghat, Padma Bridge, Ilish or Hilsa Fish & Dhaka Mawa Highway.

Edited By : Mahabub Hasan Murad
Color Grading : Hayat Mahmud

MUNSHIGANJ :-
Munshiganj, also historically known as Bikrampur, is a district in central Bangladesh. It is a part of the Dhaka Division and borders Dhaka District.

PADMA BRIDGE :-
The Padma Multipurpose Bridge is a multipurpose road-rail bridge across the Padma River, the main distributary of Ganges, under construction in Bangladesh with its own resources. It will connect Louhajong, Munshiganj to Shariatpur and Madaripur, linking the south-west of the country, to northern and eastern regions.

ILISH / HILSA :-
The ilish, also known as the ilisha, hilsa, hilsa herring or hilsa shad, is a species of fish related to the herring, in the family Clupeidae. It is a very popular and sought-after food fish in the Indian Subcontinent. The most famous hilsha fish comes from Chandpur District, Bangladesh.

snippet.title: CID (Bengali) - а¶ЄаІАа¶Жа¶За¶°аІА - At The Store - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click to watch all the episodes of CID - 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5O3zv2ZcASgNl2V1M1Y8fEFWuo4_wIXb

Episode 409 : At The Store
-------------------------------------------
Three Friends - one blind, one mute, and one deaf are at a grocery store when they witness a crime taking place. A woman wearing a burkha and carrying a child is being chased by another man when impulsively she gives the baby to the deaf guy and leaves the store. The friends call CID, confused about what they should do. 

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

Ravi Teja runs into a tussle with Aditya's men, and this brings both Aditya and Ravi opposite each other. The fight that happens between then and how Ravi Teja brings Aditya to justice forms the plot.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вАУ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вАЬGodzilla vs. Kong,вАЭ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвАЩs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вАЬGodzilla vs. KongвАЭ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвАФinstigated by unseen forcesвАФis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (вАЬBig Little Lies,вАЭ вАЬThe Little Drummer GirlвАЭ), Millie Bobby Brown (вАЬStranger ThingsвАЭ), Rebecca Hall (вАЬChristine,вАЭ вАЬProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвАЭ), Brian Tyree Henry (вАЬJoker,вАЭ вАЬSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвАЭ), Shun Oguri (вАЬWeathering with YouвАЭ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (вАЬFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвАЭ), Julian Dennison (вАЬDeadpool 2вАЭ), with Kyle Chandler (вАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersвАЭ) and Demi√°n Bichir (вАЬThe Nun,вАЭ вАЬThe Hateful EightвАЭ).
Wingard (вАЬThe Guest,вАЭ вАЬYouвАЩre NextвАЭ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вАЬThor: RagnarokвАЭ) and Max Borenstein (вАЬGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вАЭ вАЬKong: Skull IslandвАЭ), story by Terry Rossio (вАЬPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвАЭ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersвАЭ), based on the character вАЬGodzillaвАЭ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвАЩs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вАЬThe Mummy,вАЭ вАЬWorld War ZвАЭ), production designers Owen Paterson (вАЬJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вАЭ вАЬGodzillaвАЭ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вАЬBlair WitchвАЭ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersвАЭ), costume designer Ann Foley (вАЬSkyscraperвАЭ) and visual effects supervisor John вАЬDJвАЭ DesJardin (upcoming вАЬZack SnyderвАЩs Justice LeagueвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вАЬGodzilla vs. Kong.вАЭ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Sesh Obhimaan (Yevadu 2) Bengali Dubbed Full Movie | Ram Charan, Kajal Aggarwal
snippet.description: The movie story deals with Abhiram a handsome looking NRI, who is born and brought up in London. Even though he lives abroad, Abhiram loves Indian culture and family values. One fine day, he comes to know about his dad's past which is related back to a huge family based in India.In order to fulfill his dad's dream, Abhiram lands in India. There he finds out that his roots are based in the joint family of Balaraju. Rest of the story is as to how Abhiram manages to successfully enter the family, and wins the love of everyone.

snippet.title: COBRA GIRL 2021 - New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

A B O U T  N T V 
From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. (NTV) has maintained its flagship position across all verticals since its beginning and became one of the most popular TV channels in Bangladesh. With the slogan вАШSomoyer Sathe Agamir PotheвАЩ meaning вАШheading towards the future with timeвАЩ, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003.
NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. Apart from Bangladesh, NTV broadcasts its programmes in UK, USA, Canada, some parts of Europe, Middle East, and beyond. Enjoy and stay connected with us!!!

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al JazeeraвАЩs Victoria Gatenby reports.

snippet.title: Drunk N High (Official Video) Mellow D, Aastha Gill | Adah Sharma | Akull | VYRLOriginals | New Song
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you 2021's biggest party anthem - Drunk n High by hitmaker Mellow D & Aastha Gill starring Bollywood actress Adah Sharma for a one of a kind collaboration. The song has been composed by Akull and Mellow D, lyrics have been written by Mellow D and music video is a fun and quirky storyline directed by Robby Singh.

This party banger song is sure to set you in a mood to celebrate and lift your spirits this new year. Watch the video till the end to see @Adah Sharma  in her element ;).

#AdahSharma #AasthaGill #MellowD

From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. (NTV) has maintained its flagship position across all verticals since its beginning and became one of the most popular TV channels in Bangladesh. With the slogan вАШSomoyer Sathe Agamir PotheвАЩ meaning вАШheading towards the future with timeвАЩ, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003.
NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. Apart from Bangladesh, NTV broadcasts its programmes in UK, USA, Canada, some parts of Europe, Middle East, and beyond. Enjoy and stay connected with us!!!

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, weвАЩre going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now letвАЩs head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You donвАЩt need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle вАФ you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 вАФ Perfectly round crepes
2:02 вАФ No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 вАФ Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 вАФ DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 вАФ A way to cut package tape 
8:12 вАФ DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

snippet.description:
After back to back hits like вАШLaal BindiвАЩ, вАШI Love YouвАЩ, and вАШLaal ChunariyaвАЩ, VYRL Originals brings to you AkullвАЩs Faraar featuring the beautiful actress Avneet Kaur. Akull with this song, aims to give fans a new musical experience by breaking boundaries and fusing Rajasthani folk beats to urban lyrics penned by Mellow D

Watch the cute loving chemistry between Avneet and Akull in Faraar as the beautiful story unfolds with a sweet surprise towards the end. Comment & tell us your favourite moment below

snippet.description:
Credits:
Starring Gopichand, Zareen Khan & Mehreen Pirzada
Directed by Thiru
Produced by  Rama Brahmam Sunkara
Written by Ravi
Screenplay by Thiru
Story by Thiru
Music by Vishal Chandrasekhar, Sricharan Pakala
Background Score:  Sricharan Pakala
Cinematography by Vetri Palanisamy
Edited by Marthand K Venkatesh

Synopsis
Arjun (Gopichand), one of RAWвАЩs best agents, who also leads a double life as Ramakrishna, who works as a bank employee. For years, RAW has been planning to capture Qureshi, who has been behind some of the biggest terror attacks in India. Despite knowing Qureshi is in Pakistan, RAW is helpless. In one of his missions, Arjun goes to Syria to nab a key member of QureshiвАЩs gang. It sets him off on a journey which brings him face to face with QureshiвАЩs son Sohail (Upen Patel). Watch the movie to find out whether Arjun would succeed in his mission or not.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: 2021 BHAUKAL (2021) New Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 South Movies In Hindi | Latest Movie
snippet.description:
Businessman and gold smuggler George Peter and his driver are killed under mysterious circumstances. Police investigators Muhammed Easa and Isaac discover that it was carried out with a surgical blade, causing them to think a doctor was behind it. They start investigating medical shops. At the same time, Marco JR, George's brother, meets Davis and his sons вАУ their rivals вАУ to ask whether it was their work. Davis's son Abraham starts speaking in a condescending manner, enraging Marco and provoking him to shoot Abraham.During his funeral, Easa asks Davis if it was Marco. Davis does not tell him, thinking that he could seek revenge on his own.Some days after an unknown person shoots Patrick вАУ the mid stander between the 2 gangs вАУ Easa and Isaac take him to Star Hospital where he gets murdered despite being protected with maximum security. This solidifies Easa and Isaac's theory that the murderer is a doctor.

Meanwhile, someone interrogates a pharmacist to know the truth over the murders. Both the gangs start believing that someone is after them.Isaac becomes suspicious of Easa since he earlier said that he had an informant but didn't reveal anything about him. Isaac investigates on his own, discovering that Dr. Mikhael John, the casualty specialist of Star Hospital, is both the killer and the informant. He also understands that Easa is helping Mikhael since they had contacted each other several times. He tells Easa what he has learned in his investigation, forcing Easa to reveal everything in order to prevent the arrest of Dr. Mikhael. Easa explains that when Mikhael was 10 years old, he was involved in an accident that killed his father. Mikhael's mother blamed him for his father's death.

snippet.title: а¶Ѓа¶ња¶Ња¶®а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶ХаІНа¶Ја¶Ѓа¶§а¶ЊаІЯ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІА, а¶ЄаІБ а¶Ъа¶њ а¶У а¶∞а¶Ња¶ЈаІНа¶ЯаІНа¶∞а¶™а¶§а¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶Жа¶Яа¶ХаІЗа¶∞ а¶™а¶∞ а¶Ьа¶∞аІБа¶∞а¶њ а¶Еа¶ђа¶ЄаІНа¶•а¶Њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ 1Feb.21| Myanmar
snippet.description:
Military coup in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
а¶Ѓа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶®а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶ХаІНа¶Ја¶Ѓа¶§а¶Њ а¶¶а¶Ца¶≤аІЗ а¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗ аІІ а¶ђа¶Ыа¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶Ьа¶®аІНа¶ѓ а¶Ьа¶∞аІБа¶∞аІА а¶Еа¶ђа¶ЄаІНа¶•а¶Њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶Ха¶∞аІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа¶Яа¶ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІАа•§ а¶Жа¶Яа¶Х а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶ХаІНа¶Ја¶Ѓа¶§а¶Ња¶ЄаІАа¶® а¶¶а¶≤аІЗа¶∞ а¶®аІЗа¶§аІНа¶∞аІА а¶Еа¶В а¶Єа¶Ња¶® а¶ЄаІБ а¶Ъа¶ња¶Єа¶є а¶¶а¶≤аІЗа¶∞ а¶ґаІАа¶∞аІНа¶Ј а¶ХаІЯаІЗа¶Ха¶Ьа¶® а¶®аІЗа¶§а¶Ња¶ХаІЗа•§ а¶ђа¶®аІНа¶І а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶ЃаІЛа¶ђа¶Ња¶За¶≤ а¶За¶®аІНа¶Яа¶Ња¶∞а¶®аІЗа¶Яа¶Єа¶є а¶Єа¶ЃаІНа¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ъа¶Ња¶∞ а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶ІаІНа¶ѓа¶Ѓа•§ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Іа¶Ња¶® а¶ґа¶єа¶∞а¶ЧаІБа¶≤аІЛа¶§аІЗ а¶Еа¶ђа¶ЄаІНа¶•а¶Ња¶® а¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Њ а¶Єа¶¶а¶ЄаІНа¶ѓа¶∞а¶Ња•§ а¶Па¶¶а¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Њ а¶Еа¶≠аІНа¶ѓаІБа¶§аІНа¶•а¶Ња¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶®а¶ња¶®аІНа¶¶а¶Њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗ а¶ђаІНа¶ѓа¶Ња¶ђа¶ЄаІНа¶•а¶Њ а¶®аІЗа¶УаІЯа¶Ња¶∞ а¶єаІБа¶ґа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶¶а¶њаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ  а¶Ьа¶Ња¶§а¶ња¶Єа¶Ва¶Ша¶Єа¶є а¶ђа¶ња¶ґаІНа¶ђаІЗа¶∞ а¶ђа¶ња¶≠а¶ња¶®аІНа¶® а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа•§ а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶ЄаІБа¶¶ а¶∞а¶Ња¶®а¶Ња¶∞ а¶°аІЗа¶ЄаІНа¶Х а¶∞а¶ња¶™аІЛа¶∞аІНа¶Я

а¶Ѓа¶ња¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶®а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶∞а¶Ња¶ЈаІНа¶ЯаІНа¶∞а¶™а¶§а¶њ а¶Йа¶За¶® а¶Ѓа¶ња¶®аІНа¶Я, а¶ХаІНа¶Ја¶Ѓа¶§а¶Ња¶ЄаІАа¶® а¶¶а¶≤аІЗа¶∞ а¶®аІЗа¶§аІНа¶∞аІА а¶Еа¶В а¶Єа¶Ња¶® а¶ЄаІБ а¶Ъа¶ња¶Єа¶є а¶¶а¶≤аІЗа¶∞ а¶ґаІАа¶∞аІНа¶Ј а¶ХаІЯаІЗа¶Ха¶Ьа¶® а¶®аІЗа¶§а¶Ња¶ХаІЗ а¶ЄаІЛа¶Ѓа¶ђа¶Ња¶∞ а¶≠аІЛа¶∞аІЗ а¶Еа¶≠а¶ња¶ѓа¶Ња¶® а¶Ъа¶Ња¶≤а¶њаІЯаІЗ а¶Жа¶Яа¶Х а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯа•§ а¶Па¶∞ а¶™а¶∞аІЗа¶З а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ аІІ а¶ђа¶Ыа¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶Ьа¶®аІНа¶ѓ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯ а¶Ьа¶∞аІБа¶∞а¶њ а¶Еа¶ђа¶ЄаІНа¶•а¶Њ а•§а¶Єа¶ЩаІНа¶ЧаІЗ  а¶≠а¶Ња¶∞а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ња¶™аІНа¶§ а¶™аІНа¶∞аІЗа¶Єа¶ња¶°аІЗа¶®аІНа¶Я а¶єа¶ња¶ЄаІЗа¶ђаІЗ а¶¶а¶ЊаІЯа¶ња¶§аІНа¶ђ а¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗа¶® а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа¶Яа¶ња¶∞ а¶Єа¶Ња¶Ѓа¶∞а¶ња¶Х а¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІА а¶Єа¶Ѓа¶∞аІНа¶•а¶ња¶§ а¶≠а¶Ња¶За¶Є а¶™аІНа¶∞аІЗа¶Єа¶ња¶°аІЗа¶®аІНа¶Я а¶Ѓа¶ња¶®аІНа¶Я а¶ЄаІЛа¶ѓа¶ЉаІЗа•§ а¶Па¶Х а¶ђа¶ња¶ђаІГа¶§а¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІА а¶Ьа¶Ња¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ, а¶®а¶ња¶∞аІНа¶ђа¶Ња¶Ъа¶®аІЗ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶≤а¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶Ха¶Ња¶∞а¶®аІЗ а¶§а¶Ња¶¶аІЗа¶∞  а¶Жа¶Яа¶Х а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ

а¶≠аІЛа¶Я а¶Ьа¶Ња¶≤а¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶ѓаІЗа¶Єа¶ђ а¶Еа¶≠а¶ња¶ѓаІЛа¶Ч а¶Ыа¶ња¶≤ а¶§а¶Ња¶∞ а¶Єа¶†а¶ња¶Х а¶Єа¶Ѓа¶Ња¶Іа¶Ња¶® а¶®а¶Њ а¶Ха¶∞аІЗа¶З а¶Єа¶Ва¶Єа¶¶ а¶Еа¶Іа¶ња¶ђаІЗа¶ґа¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶Жа¶ѓаІЛа¶Ьа¶® а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єа¶ЪаІНа¶ЫаІЗ, а¶ЄаІБа¶§а¶∞а¶Ња¶В а¶Єа¶Ва¶ђа¶ња¶Іа¶Ња¶® а¶Еа¶®аІБа¶Єа¶Ња¶∞аІЗ а¶¶аІЗа¶ґаІЗа¶∞ а¶Жа¶За¶® а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶£а¶ѓа¶Ља¶®, а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶ґа¶Ња¶Єа¶®, а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Іа¶Ња¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶єа¶Ња¶§аІЗ а¶єа¶ЄаІНа¶§а¶Ња¶®аІНа¶§а¶∞ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єа¶ѓа¶ЉаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ

а¶∞а¶Ња¶Ьа¶Іа¶Ња¶®аІА а¶Па¶ђа¶В а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Іа¶Ња¶® а¶ґа¶єа¶∞ а¶За¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶ЩаІНа¶ЧаІБа¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶∞а¶Ња¶ЄаІНа¶§а¶Ња¶ѓа¶Љ а¶Па¶∞а¶ња¶Ѓа¶Ња¶ЭаІЗ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶¶аІЗа¶∞ а¶Яа¶єа¶≤ а¶¶аІЗа¶Ца¶Њ а¶ЧаІЗа¶ЫаІЗа•§ а¶ђа¶ња¶ЪаІНа¶Ыа¶ња¶®аІНа¶® а¶Ха¶∞аІЗ а¶¶аІЗа¶Уа¶ѓа¶Ља¶Њ а¶єа¶ѓа¶ЉаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ, а¶ЯаІЗа¶≤а¶ња¶ЂаІЛа¶® а¶У а¶За¶®аІНа¶Яа¶Ња¶∞а¶®аІЗа¶Я а¶≤а¶Ња¶За¶®а•§ а¶Єа¶Ња¶Ѓа¶∞а¶ња¶Х а¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІАа¶∞ а¶™а¶ХаІНа¶Ј а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶ђа¶®аІНа¶І а¶ШаІЛа¶Ја¶®а¶Њ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ, а¶∞а¶Ња¶ЈаІНа¶ЯаІНа¶∞а¶њаІЯ а¶∞аІЗа¶°а¶ња¶У а¶ЯаІЗа¶≤а¶ња¶≠а¶ња¶ґа¶®а•§   

а¶Жа¶™а¶ЄвА¶

а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа¶Яа¶ња¶∞ а¶Єа¶Ња¶Ѓа¶∞а¶ња¶Х а¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІА а¶ЧаІЗа¶≤ а¶ђа¶Ыа¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶®а¶≠аІЗа¶ЃаІНа¶ђа¶∞аІЗ а¶Еа¶®аІБа¶ЈаІНа¶†а¶ња¶§ а¶®а¶ња¶∞аІНа¶ђа¶Ња¶Ъа¶®аІЗ а¶ђаІНа¶ѓа¶Ња¶™а¶Х а¶≠аІЛа¶Я а¶Ьа¶Ња¶≤а¶ња¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶§а¶ња¶∞ а¶Еа¶≠а¶ња¶ѓаІЛа¶Ч а¶§аІЛа¶≤аІЗа•§ а¶®а¶ња¶∞аІНа¶ђа¶Ња¶Ъа¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶Ђа¶≤ а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶§аІНа¶ѓа¶Ња¶ЦаІНа¶ѓа¶Ња¶® а¶Па¶Ѓа¶®а¶Ха¶њ а¶Жа¶Єа¶®аІНа¶® а¶Єа¶Ва¶Єа¶¶ а¶Еа¶Іа¶ња¶ђаІЗа¶ґа¶® а¶ђа¶Ња¶§а¶ња¶≤аІЗа¶∞ а¶¶а¶Ња¶ђа¶њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶®а¶ЊаІЯ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІАа•§ а¶Па¶∞ а¶Жа¶ЧаІЗа¶З а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІА а¶Па¶ђа¶В а¶Єа¶∞а¶Ха¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶Ѓа¶§а¶ђа¶ња¶∞аІЛа¶І а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ха¶Я а¶єа¶УаІЯа¶ЊаІЯ а¶Єа¶Ња¶Ѓа¶∞а¶ња¶Х а¶Еа¶≠аІНа¶ѓаІБа¶§аІНа¶•а¶Ња¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶Жа¶ґа¶ЩаІНа¶Ха¶Њ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Њ а¶єаІЯа•§ а¶§а¶ђаІЗ а¶Ѓа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶®а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞ а¶ЄаІЗа¶®а¶Ња¶ђа¶Ња¶єа¶ња¶®аІАа¶∞ а¶™а¶ХаІНа¶Ј а¶•аІЗа¶ХаІЗ а¶Єа¶ЃаІНа¶≠а¶Ња¶ђаІНа¶ѓ а¶Єа¶Ња¶Ѓа¶∞а¶ња¶Х а¶Еа¶≠аІНа¶ѓаІБа¶§аІНа¶•а¶Ња¶®аІЗа¶∞ а¶ђа¶ња¶ЈаІЯа¶Яа¶њ а¶®а¶Ња¶Ха¶Ъ а¶Ха¶∞а¶Ња¶∞ а¶¶аІБа¶¶а¶ња¶® а¶™а¶∞аІЗа¶З а¶Жа¶Яа¶Х а¶єа¶≤аІЗа¶® а¶ХаІНа¶Ја¶Ѓа¶§а¶Ња¶ЄаІАа¶® а¶¶а¶≤аІЗа¶∞ а¶ґаІАа¶∞аІНа¶Ј  а¶®аІЗа¶§а¶Ња¶∞

а¶Па¶¶а¶ња¶ХаІЗ а¶Ѓа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶®а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞аІЗ а¶Ьа¶∞аІБа¶∞а¶њ а¶Еа¶ђа¶ЄаІНа¶•а¶Њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗ а¶Ѓа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶®а¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞а¶ХаІЗ а¶ХаІЬа¶Њ а¶єаІБа¶ґа¶њаІЯа¶Ња¶∞а¶њ а¶¶а¶њаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶ѓаІБа¶ХаІНа¶§а¶∞а¶Ња¶ЈаІНа¶ЯаІНа¶∞а•§ а¶Па¶Ыа¶ЊаІЬа¶Њ а¶Жа¶Яа¶ХаІЗа¶∞ а¶Ша¶Яа¶®а¶Ња¶∞ а¶®а¶ња¶®аІНа¶¶а¶Њ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶®а¶њаІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗ а¶Ьа¶Ња¶§а¶ња¶Єа¶Ва¶ШаІЗа¶∞ а¶Ѓа¶єа¶Ња¶Єа¶Ъа¶ња¶ђ,  а¶Еа¶ЄаІНа¶ЯаІНа¶∞аІЗа¶≤а¶њаІЯа¶Њ, а¶Ьа¶Ња¶™а¶Ња¶®а¶Єа¶є а¶ђа¶ња¶ґаІНа¶ђаІЗа¶∞ а¶ђа¶ња¶≠а¶ња¶®аІНа¶® а¶¶аІЗа¶ґа•§
